text.title: Prompt Basics — Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure for authoring a new PromptTemplate from task spec to committed code.

step.name: define-role-and-constraints
step.input: Task spec: who the model represents, what it must / must not do.
step.action: Author the `system` string via `build_system(role, constraints, output_format)`. Ban "be helpful" — only concrete constraints.

step.name: write-user-template
step.action: Define `user_template` with `{var}` placeholders for every dynamic field. No f-strings, no `.format` outside this string.

step.name: add-few-shot
step.action: Curate to 3–5 examples max. Place the most representative pair last. Skip if zero-shot suffices.
step.decision-gate: If task ambiguity is low (one clear output per input), skip examples to save tokens.

step.name: render
step.output: messages array matching the output contract.

step.name: call-llm
step.action: Pass to `client.chat.completions.create(...)` via the retry-client wrapper.

step.name: snapshot-and-commit
step.action: Commit fixtures alongside template; CI snapshot-tests rendered output against pinned model.
